name: secure-ledger
description: 密钥终端 - 凭证管理与自动化登录平台

scripts.build:win: node scripts/prepare-build.js win32 && vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:linux: node scripts/prepare-build.js linux && vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && electron-builder --linux
scripts.build:linux:deb: node scripts/prepare-build.js linux && vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && electron-builder --linux deb
scripts.build:linux:tar: node scripts/prepare-build.js linux && vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && electron-builder --linux tar.gz
scripts.build:mac: node scripts/prepare-build.js darwin && vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && electron-builder --mac

author: SecureLedger Team
